title: LCMC
body:
![Ver 0.3.0 logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23f4548313b4868967851e9e2113e30593e0f118.png)
# LCMC project
This is mod, that allows you to collect a variety of creatures, interact with them, and benefit from them.
## Current content
In version 0.3.0 we have: 36 entities, 14 of them is abnormalities; 6 new structures, 3 new dimensions, 100+ new items, 12 weapons, 12 armours
## What to do?
When yo will start to break block, Voice will talk in your head, and you will get "Global Manual" in your hands. 
![Proccess of getting Global Manual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/941bb8180dc8b48becce7e28519f59ed4dea5634.png)
Complete tasks from this manual to learn more about mod. 
If you lost your Global Manual, here is its craft:
![Craft of Global Manual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15c5c7d6051752051f525295715c1da24a488ac0.png)
## 0.3.3 Features
This version added new abnormality type & printer for tickets.
- How I can use printer?
- This is it: Craft printer with this recipe:
![Printer Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/725095cefd681a5e6652168505226742a719756d.png)

After that, add your essences in printer, counter of essences will increase.
![Adding print material](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6f01866215282ca4b090b91aa7652eab12c9480.png)

Tap on buttons to select what color we will use, Chances of getting certain Risk level or color of abnormality will change depending on the colors selected.
![Selecting colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c8c64a3f4edf3ba4151c0bbd49e2dcaf4e31ddc.png)


Press "Print ticket" when you'll be ready. Don't forget paper!
![Printed ticket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad9186424b2e4c31b840cf36c5ed870691d4bb86.png)

If you add Stick in top right slot, you will be able to print corrupted tickets
![Corrupted ticket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7727b37d13636a5bbeb91fdecc23bf18615ae657.png)
Corrupted ticket will give you corrupted abnormalities, they produce Cogito instead of PE. Cogito can be loaded in printer & can be used to to save colors. For example: 5 red Essences & 1 red & 4 Cogito will give same result.
![Different income, but same result](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3206bc751a5245c9073edfcc04120b86e9afd876.png)
## Tables of Printing (Default & corrupted Abn)
![Table of printing of default tickets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37d9da781e4402f6da34856329517012f1738e04.png)
![Table of printing of corrupted tickets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eea22be77b50da5d33e4564fb9083baea5c60e2a.png)
